title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.14. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Orlando are extreme, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.0 GG, indicating a high demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, which can exacerbate the heat-related issues. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 13.2 km/h, but it may not provide sufficient relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the public and infrastructure.
